title: Beta Patch Notes - v0.99
author: demileaf
contents:
[p]Hey, Slayers! Happy 1-week-since-launch day! Today's patch mostly contains a lot of bug fixes, but it also contains a few art additions and a new limit to max HP values.

Heads up that this patch will at first be exclusive to the [b]newly released public-beta branch[/b] for players who want to try out the newest updates and ensure they're stable before they're pushed to the main branch. You can access it by right-clicking on [i]Slay the Spire 2[/i] in your Steam Library, then clicking Properties > Game Versions & Betas > public-beta.
[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/44971832/7f9dcc64f631fb4047a1e86d34082c1d81131830.jpg"][/img][/p][p][/p][h3]BALANCE:[/h3][list][*][p]Players, enemies, and pets can no longer have their HP increased above 999,999,999[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][h3]ART:[/h3][list][*][p] Add icon for Murderous run modifier[/p][/*][*][p]Added portrait art for the following cards:[/p][list][*][p]Feeding Frenzy[/p][/*][*][p]Sloth[/p][/*][*][p]Waste Away [/p][/*][/list][/*][/list][p][/p][h3]BUG FIXES:[/h3][p]
[b]General:[/b][/p][list][*][p]Pressing B on controller while focused on a dropdown menu no longer also closes the settings screen[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed crash when interacting with potions during combat transitions[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed crash when syncing cloud saves on Windows[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed rare save data loss on Windows when power is lost during a save[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed crash when quickly navigating away from menus[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed dev console failing to match commands on non-English system locales[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed potential softlock when auto-played cards trigger grid or card selection[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed state divergence related to discarding potions too soon after combat ends[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed being able to "peek" in card screens outside of combat[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed closing the settings menu while a dropdown is open not also closing the dropdown[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed navigating down the dropdown items causing the settings to scroll down[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed softlock when auto-played cards triggered card selection[/p][/*][/list][p][b]Ironclad:[/b][/p][list][*][p]Fixed [b]Hellraiser[/b] power playing Strikes if there are no valid targets[/p][/*][/list][p][b]Potions & Relics[/b]:[/p][list][*][p]Fixed [b]Fairy in a Bottle[/b] and [b]Lizard Tail[/b] relics not healing you when your Max HP is 1[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed [b]Massive Scroll[/b] relic description saying that it can only give you Colorless multiplayer cards[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed softlock if you proc [b]Lasting Candy[/b] relic from the fixed tutorial card rewards[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed [b]Hand Drill[/b] relic applying Vulnerable to the player if [b]Burn[/b] card breaks their block[/p][/*][/list][p][b]Enemies:[/b][/p][list][*][p]Fixed missing [b]Kaiser Crab[/b] boss death VFX[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed [b]Kaiser Crab[/b] face animation not looping after a claw takes damage[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed the word "Stunned" not appearing when [b]Rock Bowlbug[/b] does its stunned move[/p][/*][/list][p][b]Ancients:[/b][/p][list][*][p]Fixed Tezcatara's [b]Brightest Flame[/b] card being able to decrease your Max HP to less than 1[/p][/*][/list][p][b]Events:[/b][/p][list][*][p]Fixed softlock when dying in the [b]Jungle Maze Adventure[/b] event[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed softlock if you die in the [b]Room Full of Cheese[/b] event[/p][/*][/list][p][b]Multiplayer:[/b][/p][list][*][p]Fixed softlock when any player has [b]Potion Belt[/b] and [b]Alchemical Coffer[/b] relics[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed being unable to navigate via controller if you unready yourself in lobby[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed players being unable to end their turn when they die while the [b]Whispering Earring[/b] relic autoplays their cards[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed [b]Doormaker[/b]'s Door HP not scaling correctly after the Doormaker escapes[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed softlock when queueing a potion to be thrown after the enemy would die[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed crash when returning to the map after loading a multiplayer save[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed host and client sometimes generating different maps from the same seed[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed map changing after reconnect with the [b]Big Game Hunter[/b] modifier or [b]Treasure Map[/b] and [b]Golden Compass[/b] relics[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed softlock caused by a player dying with cards in their hand[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed state divergence related to playing Huddle Up during another player's card selection[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed timing-related state divergence occurring at the end of a combat[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed rare instances of getting stuck at an empty chest[/p][/*][/list][p][b]Localization:[/b][/p][list][*][p]Fixed crash when selecting Ironclad on Turkish locale systems[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed Russian card descriptions showing raw template text for [b]Call of the Void[/b], [b]Coolheaded[/b], [b]Fuel[/b], and [b]Ice Lance[/b] cards[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue when viewing run histories in Russian where the player played as The Defect[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue with [b]Buffer+[/b] card's description when playing in Portuguese[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue with [b]Call of the Void[/b] card's hovertips when playing in Castilian Spanish[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue with [b]Colossus[/b] card's hovertips when playing in German[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue with the "Accept" option in [b]The Trial[/b] event when playing in French[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue with the "Violence" option in the [b]Tinker Time[/b] event when playing in Korean[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][h3]LOCALIZATION:[/h3][list][*][p]Added more translated text for various languages[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed translation and formatting errors for the following languages:[/p][list][*][p]Italian[/p][/*][*][p]Russian[/p][/*][*][p]Simplified Chinese[/p][/*][*][p]Turkish[/p][/*][*][p]German[/p][/*][*][p]Spanish[/p][/*][*][p]Polish[/p][/*][/list][/*][*][p]Adjusted Japanese font to be rendered slightly smaller and raised to improve vertical centering[/p][/*][*][p]Improved Korean font spacing[/p][/*][*][p]Improved Russian and Thai font rendering[/p][/*][*][p]Improved the look of Simplified Chinese font[/p][/*][*][p]Share button in stats screen now utilizes correct localized string[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][h3]MODDING:[/h3][list][*][p]Reworked mod structure[/p][list][*][p]mod_manifest.json has been moved outside of the PCK. All mods should now ship with an additional file named <mod_id>.json - see ModManifest for the new JSON structure.[/p][/*][*][p]PCK is no longer required for all mods. Json is the only file that is required to declare a mod. The json must declare whether the mod includes a pck/dll file.[/p][/*][*][p]settings.save now includes a list of all mods that were loaded in the last game run. Reordering this list affects load order.[/p][/*][*][p]Mods may declare dependencies in the manifest. If settings.save declares a load order incompatible with the listed dependencies, then a re-sort is forced.[/p][/*][*][p]Added affects_gameplay field to mod manifest. If false, then the mod will not be checked against the host's mods in a multiplayer game.[/p][/*][*][p]Updated 0Harmony/MonoMod to support mac arm64. Manually overwriting it should no longer be required.[/p][/*][/list][/*][/list]
